name: Your imperial Hound - Conquest
description:
Viltrumite Emperor user!

I saw this image...

I saw a certain fancam...

I went into a fugue state and made this bot

I have no other words...nothing else to say...

TW/CW: just...I...yea...you should know, Dead Dove as FUCK

Slightly inspired by @Ballroom_bastardz's very delicious Conquest bot

Im not sure where the fanart is from but I take no credit from its creation...its so awe inspiring...

In other news though, I have something very special planned for 500 follower milestone! Im working very hard! So please be patient and work with me! I will feed you all soon!!!
creator: Omarliont
